dataset.name: MEV Relay
dataset.description: Events derived from MEV relays. Data is scraped from multiple MEV Relays by multiple instances.

tables.name: mev_relay_bid_trace
tables.description: Contains MEV relay block bids data.

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: event_date_time
columns.description: When the bid was fetched

columns.name: slot
columns.description: Slot number within the block bid

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The start time for the slot that the bid is for

columns.name: epoch
columns.description: Epoch number derived from the slot that the bid is for

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The start time for the epoch that the bid is for

columns.name: wallclock_request_slot
columns.description: The wallclock slot when the request was sent

columns.name: wallclock_request_slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The start time for the slot when the request was sent

columns.name: wallclock_request_epoch
columns.description: The wallclock epoch when the request was sent

columns.name: wallclock_request_epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The start time for the wallclock epoch when the request was sent

columns.name: requested_at_slot_time
columns.description: The time in the slot when the request was sent

columns.name: response_at_slot_time
columns.description: The time in the slot when the response was received

columns.name: relay_name
columns.description: The relay that the bid was fetched from

columns.name: parent_hash
columns.description: The parent hash of the bid

columns.name: block_number
columns.description: The block number of the bid

columns.name: block_hash
columns.description: The block hash of the bid

columns.name: builder_pubkey
columns.description: The builder pubkey of the bid

columns.name: proposer_pubkey
columns.description: The proposer pubkey of the bid

columns.name: proposer_fee_recipient
columns.description: The proposer fee recipient of the bid

columns.name: gas_limit
columns.description: The gas limit of the bid

columns.name: gas_used
columns.description: The gas used of the bid

columns.name: value
columns.description: The transaction value in float64

columns.name: num_tx
columns.description: The number of transactions in the bid

columns.name: timestamp
columns.description: The timestamp of the bid

columns.name: timestamp_ms
columns.description: The timestamp of the bid in milliseconds

columns.name: optimistic_submission
columns.description: Whether the bid was optimistic

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_version
columns.description: Version of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_implementation
columns.description: Implementation of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_os
columns.description: Operating system of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_ip
columns.description: IP address of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_city
columns.description: City of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_country
columns.description: Country of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_country_code
columns.description: Country code of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_continent_code
columns.description: Continent code of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_longitude
columns.description: Longitude of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_latitude
columns.description: Latitude of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_autonomous_system_number
columns.description: Autonomous system number of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_autonomous_system_organization
columns.description: Autonomous system organization of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_network_name
columns.description: Ethereum network name

tables.name: mev_relay_proposer_payload_delivered
tables.description: Contains MEV relay proposer payload delivered data.

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: event_date_time
columns.description: When the payload was delivered

columns.name: slot
columns.description: Slot number within the payload

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The start time for the slot that the bid is for

columns.name: epoch
columns.description: Epoch number derived from the slot that the bid is for

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The start time for the epoch that the bid is for

columns.name: wallclock_slot
columns.description: The wallclock slot when the request was sent

columns.name: wallclock_slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The start time for the slot when the request was sent

columns.name: wallclock_epoch
columns.description: The wallclock epoch when the request was sent

columns.name: wallclock_epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The start time for the wallclock epoch when the request was sent

columns.name: block_number
columns.description: The block number of the payload

columns.name: relay_name
columns.description: The relay that delivered the payload

columns.name: block_hash
columns.description: The block hash associated with the payload

columns.name: proposer_pubkey
columns.description: The proposer pubkey that received the payload

columns.name: builder_pubkey
columns.description: The builder pubkey that sent the payload

columns.name: proposer_fee_recipient
columns.description: The proposer fee recipient of the payload

columns.name: gas_limit
columns.description: The gas limit of the payload

columns.name: gas_used
columns.description: The gas used by the payload

columns.name: value
columns.description: The bid value in wei

columns.name: num_tx
columns.description: The number of transactions in the payload

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_version
columns.description: Version of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_implementation
columns.description: Implementation of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_os
columns.description: Operating system of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_ip
columns.description: IP address of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_city
columns.description: City of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_country
columns.description: Country of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_country_code
columns.description: Country code of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_continent_code
columns.description: Continent code of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_longitude
columns.description: Longitude of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_latitude
columns.description: Latitude of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_autonomous_system_number
columns.description: Autonomous system number of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_autonomous_system_organization
columns.description: Autonomous system organization of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_network_name
columns.description: Ethereum network name

tables.name: mev_relay_validator_registration
tables.description: Contains MEV relay validator registrations data.

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: event_date_time
columns.description: When the registration was fetched

columns.name: timestamp
columns.description: The timestamp of the registration

columns.name: relay_name
columns.description: The relay that the registration was fetched from

columns.name: validator_index
columns.description: The validator index of the validator registration

columns.name: gas_limit
columns.description: The gas limit of the validator registration

columns.name: fee_recipient
columns.description: The fee recipient of the validator registration

columns.name: slot
columns.description: Slot number derived from the validator registration `timestamp` field

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The slot start time derived from the validator registration `timestamp` field

columns.name: epoch
columns.description: Epoch number derived from the validator registration `timestamp` field

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The epoch start time derived from the validator registration `timestamp` field

columns.name: wallclock_slot
columns.description: The wallclock slot when the request was sent

columns.name: wallclock_slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The start time for the slot when the request was sent

columns.name: wallclock_epoch
columns.description: The wallclock epoch when the request was sent

columns.name: wallclock_epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The start time for the wallclock epoch when the request was sent

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_version
columns.description: Version of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_implementation
columns.description: Implementation of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_os
columns.description: Operating system of the client that generated the event

columns.description: IP address of the client that generated the event

columns.description: City of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_country
columns.description: Country of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_country_code
columns.description: Country code of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_continent_code
columns.description: Continent code of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_longitude
columns.description: Longitude of the client that generated the event

columns.description: Latitude of the client that generated the event
